name: Torta Expanola (Spanish Omelet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the sauce first. Heat the fat or oil in a pan. Fry the onions until translucent.
2. Add the green peppers and tomatoes. Cook until the peppers are tender.
3. Stir in the tomato puree. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. For the omelet: Beat the egg whites in one bowl.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the yolks with salt, flour, and milk until thick and lemon-colored.
7. Fold the yolk mixture into the beaten whites.
8. Form the batter into 5 or 6 portions.
9. Heat the fat or oil in a frying pan. Fry the omelets for about 2 minutes on each side until lightly browned.
10. Remove the omelets from the pan and spread with the sauce.
11. Roll up each omelet and serve immediately, topped with any remaining sauce.
